news.headline: Mesa Royalty Trust income distribution for Feb 2025 is $0.002429966 per unit. Trust received $31,717 from New Mexico properties.
news.summary: Mesa Royalty Trust declared the Trust income distribution for February 2025, with unitholders of record on February 28 eligible to receive $0.002429966 per unit on April 30. This distribution stems from $31,717 generated solely from Trust's San Juan Basin properties in New Mexico, operated by Hilcorp San Juan LP, an affiliate of Hilcorp Energy Company. No additional income was received in February.

news.headline: Matador Resources Company reports Q4 and full year 2024 results, increases dividend by 25%, and provides 2025 operational update.
news.summary: In Dallas, Matador Resources Company (NYSE: MTDR) disclosed its financial performance for Q4 and FY 2024, along with an update on its 2025 operational strategy. The company also raised its dividend. A presentation outlining the key points of the Q4 and FY 2024 earnings report and the 2025 operational plan can be found on Matador's website at www.matadorresources.com under the Events section.

news.headline: Trump: Ukraine has had a seat, and this could have been settled easily.
Arista Networks Q4: Revenue beats at $1.93B, EPS beats at 65 cents vs. 57 cents expected, strong guidance provided.
news.summary: Arista Networks Inc (NYSE:ANET) released its Q4 financial results, exceeding expectations. The fourth-quarter revenue stood at $1.93 billion, surpassing analysts' $1.9 billion estimate. Adjusted earnings for the quarter were reported at 65 cents per share, higher than the expected 57 cents per share. This marked a 25.3% increase in total revenue compared to the previous year and a 6.6% increase from the prior quarter. The gross margin also showed positive performance. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Star Holdings reported a net loss of $102.6 million in Q4 2024 and $86.8 million for the fiscal year. Earnings per share were ($7.70) and ($6.51) respectively. Market-to-market adjustment on investment caused impact.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Star Holdings (NASDAQ:STHO) declared the submission of its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ended on December 31, 2024, to the Securities and Exchange Commission. The net income (loss) attributable to common shareholders was reported at ($102.6) million for the fourth quarter and ($86.8) million for the entire year. Earnings (loss) per share stood at ($7.70) for the fourth quarter and ($6.51) for the year. These figures include a non-cash market-to-market adjustment concerning their investment in approximately 13.5 million shares of SAFE, resulting in a ($104.8) million impact on earnings for the quarter and ($66.5) million for the year. Significant financial results have been shared, and further details can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

Shift4 acquires Global Blue, a financial technology leader, with 25 years of industry experience, specializing in retail and hospitality sectors, processing billions of transactions.
news.summary: Signy, Switzerland—Shift4, a prominent figure in the financial technology sector, boasts over 25 years of experience. Specializing in integrated payments, Shift4 caters to retail and hospitality industries. The company has successfully processed billions of transactions both in-person and online. Their cutting-edge technology is revolutionizing payment processes, creating seamless experiences in commerce globally.

news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland, JBG SMITH, a prominent company specializing in high-quality mixed-use properties in the Washington, DC area, has submitted its Form 10-K for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2024. As per this filing, their financial performance has been disclosed. For a detailed overview of their operational outcomes, property details, and tenant information, interested parties can access the Fourth Quarter 2024 Investor Package. This comprehensive report is available on the Investor Relations segment of their official website at www.jbgsmith.com. It is encouraged for stakeholders to review this package for further insights.

news.summary: Permianville Royalty Trust (NYSE: PVL) revealed the net profits interest calculation for February 2025. This calculation was based on oil production in November 2024 and natural gas production in October 2024, along with costs from December 2024. The Trust noted a decrease in the cumulative net profits shortfall, which had previously stood at around $2.2 million.

IFF reports Q4 and full year 2024 results: $11.5B sales, $278M income before taxes, $0.95 EPS, $2.2B operating EBITDA, 19.2% EBITDA margin.
news.summary: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2024. In 2024, the company reported total sales of $11.5 billion with an income before taxes of $278 million. The earnings per share (EPS) were $0.95, and the operating EBITDA stood at $2.2 billion with an operating EBITDA margin of 19.2%. The EPS excluding amortization was $4.31. The company expressed satisfaction with its performance in 2024, emphasizing the dedication and effort put forth by the team.

A press release will be issued, followed by a live conference call discussing AEO Inc.'s quarterly and annual performance and updates on the company's long-term strategic plan. The conference call, set for 4:30pm Eastern time on the same day, will be webcasted for easy access. Stay tuned for more information on this event.

news.headline: Occidental hits $4.5 billion debt repayment target in Q4 2024, sells assets worth $1.2 billion in Q1 2025.
news.summary: In Houston on February 18, 2025, Occidental revealed that it successfully met its goal of repaying $4.5 billion in debt in the last quarter of 2024. In addition, they disclosed that they finalized deals in the beginning of 2025 to sell undisclosed upstream assets to unidentified purchasers, generating a total of $1.2 billion.

(NYSE: VTOL), known for its innovative vertical flight solutions, disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. news.headline: Tronox announces Q1 2025 dividend of $0.125 per share, payable on April 4, 2025.

Shareholders can anticipate this dividend payout on April 4, 2025.

news.headline: Comerica Bank appoints Troy Norris as Arizona Market President. Also to oversee Business Banking and Middle Market.
news.summary: Today, in Phoenix, on February 18, 2025, Troy Norris has been appointed as the Arizona Market President for Comerica Bank. In addition to this role, he will take on the responsibilities of being the Group Manager for Business Banking and Middle Market in the area. In his new position, Norris will oversee operations for business and community initiatives, contributing to the growth and development of the region.

news.headline: Darling Ingredients Inc. converts wastewater into RNG in Georgia facility, cutting emissions & creating revenue.
news.summary: In Irving, Texas, Darling Ingredients Inc. (NYSE: DAR), a global leader in repurposing food waste into eco-friendly products and energy, unveiled a initiative producing renewable natural gas (RNG) from wastewater at its Dublin, Georgia facility. This move not only lowers Scope 1 emissions but also generates fresh income opportunities for the company. By collaborating with GreenGasUSA, the produced RNG is integrated into Dublin's natural gas supply system.

news.headline: Brookdale Senior Living Inc. reported Q4 2024 revenue growth, 100 basis points occupancy rise, net income improved by 8%, Adjusted EBITDA by 16%, and operating activities cash flow up by 54%. Lease amendment with Ventas includes non-renewal of 55 communities for an enhanced cash flow. They refinanced over $300M of 2027 debt maturities at lower rates and acquired 11 previously leased communities. CEO optimistic for 2025. Residents fees increased by $27.8M, RevPOR by $254, Weighted Avg Occupancy by 100 bps. Adjusted EBITDA increased by $13.2M. Net income improved by $7.3M. Adjusted Free Cash Flow saw a $10M increase. Total liquidity at $389.3M by the end of December 2024.
news.summary: Brookdale Senior Living Inc. announced their financial results for the quarter and full year ended December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter, they saw a 5.5% increase in consolidated revenue per available unit (RevPAR), a 100 basis points growth in weighted average occupancy, and nearly 8% improvement in net income, with a significant 16% rise in Adjusted EBITDA year-over-year. Their net cash provided by operating activities also increased by 54%, and Adjusted Free Cash Flow improved by 46% compared to the prior year quarter. They entered into a lease amendment with Ventas, Inc., refinanced over $300 million of debt at a lower interest rate, and acquired 11 previously leased communities. Brookdale's President and CEO, Lucinda Baier, expressed pride in the company's progress and commitment to growth. In full-year results, they reported a 4.0% increase in resident fee revenue, 2.5% rise in facility operating expense, and 15.1% growth in Adjusted EBITDA. Brookdale's total liquidity as of December 31, 2024, stood at $389.3 million.

news.headline: Rayonier CEO to present at Raymond James and Citi conferences on March 3rd and 5th, 2025. Visit www.rayonier.com for access.
news.summary: In Wildlight, Florida, Rayonier (NYSE:RYN) has disclosed that Mark D. McHugh, the President and Chief Executive Officer, is scheduled to speak at two upcoming conferences. Firstly, at the Raymond James 46th Annual Institutional Investors Conference on Monday, March 3, 2025, at 2:50 p.m. ET, and secondly, at Citi’s 30th Annual Global Property CEO Conference on Wednesday, March 5, 2025, at 8:50 a.m. ET. For those interested in participating, the events can be accessed by visiting the Investor Relations section of Rayonier’s website at www.rayonier.com and completing the registration process.

news.headline: ICL's Phil Brown to present at Bank of America conference on Feb 27. Visit https://investors.icl-group.com for webcast.
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, ICL, a top global specialty minerals company traded on NYSE (ICL) and TASE (ICL), revealed that Phil Brown, the president of ICL's Phosphate Solutions Division, is set to speak at the Bank of America 2025 Global Agriculture and Materials Conference on February 27, 2025, at 3:30 p.m. ET. The conference will be accessible via webcast at https://investors.icl-group.com/reports-news-and-events/default.aspx#events-presentations. Additionally, a replay of the event will be accessible post-conference.

news.headline: Ingevity (NYSE:NGVT) reveals Q4 and full year 2024 financials.
news.summary: In the city of North Charleston, South Carolina, Ingevity Corporation announced its financial performance for both the final quarter and entire year of 2024.

news.headline: Select Water Solutions announced a full year 2024 revenue of $1.5 billion, Q4 revenue of $349 million, with Water Infrastructure revenue up 26%, generating full year operating cash flows of $235 million and Q4 cash flows of $68 million. They also announced new water projects valuing $39-$41 million and Colorado partnership with $62 million initial investment. CEO highlights growth strategy with focus on Water Infrastructure segment.
news.summary: Select Water Solutions, Inc. reported full year 2024 consolidated revenue of $1.5 billion and fourth-quarter revenue of $349 million. Water Infrastructure segment's revenue in 2024 was $291 million, up 26% year-over-year, with gross profit up 62%. Operating cash flows for the full year and fourth quarter of 2024 were $235 million and $68 million respectively. The company announced new water infrastructure projects in Permian and a water rights partnership in Colorado with $62 million initial investment. They anticipate growth and improvements in margins for the Chemical Technologies and Water Services segments in 2025. The company expects another record year for Adjusted EBITDA in 2025 and aims to propel the Water Infrastructure segment to reach 50% of consolidated profitability by the end of 2025. Updated on infrastructure projects in Northern Delaware Basin and Central Basin Platform were disclosed. The company entered into a new partnership to consolidate water rights and storage portfolios in Colorado. Select anticipates modest revenue reductions in their Water Services segment in 2025. Total net capital expenditures for 2025 are targeted at $170-190 million. Cash flow from operations in 2024 was $234.9 million, with net capital expenditures of $157.3 million. Total liquidity as of December 31, 2024, was $134.8 million. Business segments information was detailed, along with financial information, business development updates, and the company's future outlook.

news.headline: Bel Fuse Inc. reported Q4 2024 net sales of $149.9M, down 7.8% organically from Q4-2023. Full-year 2024 sales at $534.8M & Non-GAAP net earnings at $72.1M. Acquisition of Enercon completed. CEO transition announced for next generation succession.
news.summary: Bel Fuse Inc. reported preliminary financial results for Q4 and full year 2024. In Q4 2024, net sales were $149.9 million, up from $140.0 million in Q4 2023, with a gross profit margin of 37.5%. GAAP net loss was $1.8 million, while non-GAAP net earnings were $19.0 million. For the full year 2024, net sales were $534.8 million, down from $639.8 million in 2023, with a gross profit margin of 37.8%. GAAP net earnings were $41.0 million, and non-GAAP net earnings were $72.1 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $30.3 million in Q4 and $101.9 million for the full year. Bel completed the acquisition of Enercon and anticipates a slow rebound in demand in 2025. They plan to focus on revenue synergy opportunities and operational efficiencies. Farouq Tuweiq, CFO, discussed key initiatives in 2024 and future expectations. These findings were announced in a press release by Bel Fuse Inc. on Feb. 18, 2025.

news.headline: GreenGasUSA & Darling Ingredients mark 1st RNG deliveries from Dublin facility, reducing emissions & creating revenue.
news.summary: In Dublin, Georgia, GreenGasUSA and Darling Ingredients Inc. (NYSE: DAR) have revealed the commencement of renewable natural gas (RNG) deliveries from a project situated at Darling Ingredients’ rendering facility. Through this initiative, Darling Ingredients harnesses the potential of on-site wastewater streams to enhance biogas to pipeline-quality RNG. This process aids in diminishing Scope 1 emissions while simultaneously establishing an additional revenue avenue for the company. The Dublin facility successfully introduced RNG into the City of Dublin’s natural gas network.

news.headline: Star Bulk Carriers Corp. earns $42.4M profit in Q4 2024, declares $0.09/share dividend.
news.summary: In Athens, Greece, news was released on February 18, 2025, by Star Bulk Carriers Corp. (Nasdaq: SBLK), a worldwide shipping firm specialized in dry bulk cargo transportation. United Community Banks, Inc. announces $429.6875 per share dividend on Preferred Stock, payable on March 14, 2025.
news.summary: In Greenville, S.C. on February 18, 2025, United Community Banks, Inc. (NYSE: UCB) announced that their Board of Directors has authorized a quarterly cash dividend of $429.6875 per share for their 6.875% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series I (NYSE: UCB PRI). This amount is equal to $0.4296875 per depositary share or a 1/1000th interest per share. Shareholders of record on February 28, 2025, will receive the dividend on March 14, 2025.
